---
title: Skip-to-content link (dashboard)
format: dashboard
_quarto:
  tests:
    dashboard:
      ensureHtmlElements:
        -
          # skip link is the first element of the body
          - 'body > a#quarto-skip-link:first-child[href="#quarto-document-content"]'
          # dashboards have no <main>; the content container gets the id,
          # tabindex, and a main landmark role
          - 'div.quarto-dashboard-content#quarto-document-content[tabindex="-1"][role="main"]'
        - []
---

Dashboards should include a "Skip to main content" link that bypasses the
navbar and page tabs, and their content container should be marked as the
main landmark (<https://github.com/quarto-dev/quarto-cli/issues/14684>).

# Heat

## Row

Content A

# Cool

Content B
